description: Create comprehensive 4-panel figure: pLDDT profile, zinc coordination schematic, RPP21 comparison, evidence summary
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np
import requests

# Download AlphaFold model for pLDDT data
api_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/api/prediction/Q32NC0"
resp = requests.get(api_url, timeout=15)
api_data = resp.json()
pdb_url = api_data[0]['pdbUrl']
pdb_resp = requests.get(pdb_url, timeout=15)
pdb_text = pdb_resp.text

# Parse pLDDT
residues = []
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith("ATOM") and line[12:16].strip() == "CA":
        resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        residues.append((resnum, bfactor))

resnums = [r[0] for r in residues]
plddts = [r[1] for r in residues]

# Create comprehensive 3-panel figure
fig = plt.figure(figsize=(16, 14))
gs = fig.add_gridspec(3, 2, height_ratios=[1.2, 1.2, 1.5], hspace=0.35, wspace=0.3)

# Panel A: pLDDT profile with domain annotations
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, :])
colors = []
for p in plddts:
    if p > 90: colors.append('#0053D6')
    elif p > 70: colors.append('#65CBF3')
    elif p > 50: colors.append('#FFDB13')
    else: colors.append('#FF7D45')
ax1.bar(resnums, plddts, color=colors, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, linewidth=0.8)
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5, linewidth=0.8)

# Highlight zinc-coordinating cysteines
for cys_pos in [43, 46, 104, 107]:
    idx = resnums.index(cys_pos) if cys_pos in resnums else None
    if idx is not None:
        ax1.plot(cys_pos, plddts[idx], 'v', color='red', markersize=10, zorder=5)

# Mark experimental structure coverage
ax1.axvspan(2, 119, alpha=0.08, color='blue', label='Resolved in cryo-EM (9UH9)')
ax1.axvspan(120, 220, alpha=0.06, color='gray')

ax1.annotate('Zn²⁺\nCPYC', xy=(44.5, 95), fontsize=9, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.annotate('Zn²⁺\nCKTC', xy=(105.5, 95), fontsize=9, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.annotate('Disordered\n(not resolved)', xy=(170, 30), fontsize=9, ha='center', color='gray')

ax1.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue number', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('A. C18orf21/RMP24 AlphaFold Confidence & Experimental Coverage', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_xlim(0, 225)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 105)
ax1.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=9)

# Panel B: Zinc coordination schematic
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])
ax2.set_xlim(-3, 3)
ax2.set_ylim(-3, 3)
ax2.set_aspect('equal')
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.set_title('B. Zinc Coordination in C18orf21\n(PDB 9UH9, chain K)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Draw zinc at center
zn_circle = plt.Circle((0, 0), 0.3, color='#888888', ec='black', linewidth=2, zorder=10)
ax2.add_patch(zn_circle)
ax2.text(0, 0, 'Zn²⁺', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=11)

# Draw coordinating cysteines in tetrahedral arrangement
cys_positions = {
    'CYS43': (-1.5, 1.5),
    'CYS46': (1.5, 1.5),
    'CYS104': (-1.5, -1.5),
    'CYS107': (1.5, -1.5)
}

for cys, (cx, cy) in cys_positions.items():
    cys_circle = plt.Circle((cx, cy), 0.4, color='#FFD700', ec='black', linewidth=1.5, zorder=8)
    ax2.add_patch(cys_circle)
    ax2.text(cx, cy, 'SG', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', zorder=9)
    ax2.text(cx, cy + 0.65 if cy > 0 else cy - 0.65, cys, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, color='darkblue', fontweight='bold')
    
    # Draw bond line
    ax2.plot([0, cx], [0, cy], 'k-', linewidth=2, zorder=5)
    # Distance annotation
    mid_x, mid_y = cx/2, cy/2
    ax2.text(mid_x + 0.15, mid_y + 0.15, '2.33Å', fontsize=8, color='green', fontweight='bold',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.1', facecolor='white', alpha=0.8))

# Motif labels
ax2.text(-1.5, 2.4, 'CPYC motif\n(res 43-46)', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='darkred', style='italic')
ax2.text(1.5, -2.4, 'CKTC motif\n(res 104-107)', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='darkred', style='italic')

# Geometry annotation
ax2.text(0, -2.8, 'Mean SG-Zn-SG angle: 109.5° ± 2.6°\n(ideal tetrahedral: 109.5°)', 
         ha='center', fontsize=9, color='green', fontweight='bold')

# Panel C: Comparison table (C18orf21 vs RPP21)
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_title('C. Zinc-Finger Comparison:\nC18orf21/RMP24 vs RPP21', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

table_data = [
    ['Feature', 'C18orf21/RMP24', 'RPP21'],
    ['Complex', 'RNase MRP', 'RNase P'],
    ['Zinc motif 1', 'CPYC (43-46)', 'CRGC (62-65)'],
    ['Zinc motif 2', 'CKTC (104-107)', 'CLTC (92-95)'],
    ['CxxC spacing', 'CxxC-x(57)-CxxC', 'CxxC-x(26)-CxxC'],
    ['Coordination', 'Cys₄ (confirmed)', 'Cys₄ (by analogy)'],
    ['Zn in PDB', 'Yes (9UH9)', 'Not standalone'],
    ['Zn distances', '2.32-2.33 Å', 'N/A'],
    ['Geometry', 'Tetrahedral', 'Tetrahedral¹'],
    ['Sequence ID', '<15%', '—'],
    ['Foldseek E', '~10⁻⁴', '—'],
]

colors_table = [['#D4E6F1']*3]
for i in range(1, len(table_data)):
    if i % 2 == 0:
        colors_table.append(['#F2F3F4']*3)
    else:
        colors_table.append(['#FFFFFF']*3)

table = ax3.table(cellText=table_data, cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                  cellColours=colors_table)
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(9)
table.scale(1, 1.3)
for key, cell in table.get_celld().items():
    if key[0] == 0:
        cell.set_text_props(fontweight='bold')

ax3.text(0.5, -0.05, '¹ Inferred from archaeal RPP21 NMR (PMID: 18922021)',
         transform=ax3.transAxes, ha='center', fontsize=8, style='italic')

# Panel D: Evidence summary
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, :])
ax4.axis('off')
ax4.set_title('D. Key Evidence Summary for Fold Assignment', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

evidence_text = """
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  VERDICT: DUF4674 fold is ASSIGNABLE to RPP21/Rpr2 structural superfamily                           │
│                                                                                                       │
│  Foldseek vs PDB100:        No confident matches (best prob=35.3%) → fold appears "novel"             │
│  Foldseek vs AlphaFold DB:  RPP21 clearly detected (E≈10⁻⁴) → fold is RPP21-like                     │
│  Experimental structure:    PDB 9UH9 (3.47Å) — 118/220 residues resolved in cryo-EM                  │
│  Zinc coordination:         Cys₄ tetrahedral zinc (CYS43/46/104/107), distances 2.32-2.33Å           │
│  Shared with RPP21:         Zinc-binding CxxC-x(n)-CxxC motif, α-helical core, RNA binding           │
│  Literature (2025-2026):    3 groups independently identified C18orf21=RMP24 (RNase MRP subunit)      │
│                                                                                                       │
│  GO CURATION LEADS:                                                                                   │
│  MF: GO:0008270 (zinc ion binding) — direct structural evidence from PDB 9UH9                         │
│  MF: GO:0003723 (RNA binding) — stabilizes RNase MRP catalytic RNA                                    │
│  BP: GO:0006364 (rRNA processing) — required for pre-rRNA cleavage                                    │
│  CC: GO:0000171 (ribonuclease MRP complex) — cryo-EM-confirmed subunit                                │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
"""

ax4.text(0.02, 0.95, evidence_text, transform=ax4.transAxes, fontsize=9.5,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='#DAA520'))

plt.savefig('/tmp/c18orf21_comprehensive_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Comprehensive figure saved!")
